__meta__.method: Seed data; replace via scripts/build_backtest.py once historical model probabilities + actual results are aligned.
__meta__.hybrid_note: Hybrid is now an equal ⅓ J5L + ⅓ DT + ⅓ Kalshi blend (was 50/50 model+market). These per-tournament figures predate that change and remain ESTIMATES — historical per-match Kalshi odds don't exist, so a true ⅓ hybrid backtest is pending. Measured (point-in-time Elo) decisive-match accuracy is ~73%; strict 3-way ~54%. See v3-model-changes/backtest/.
__meta__.dt_note: DT is now an Elo + squad market-value blend (0.6/0.4), bivariate-Poisson Monte-Carlo title odds. Its row here is an Elo-baseline ESTIMATE pending a fitted harness — treat as a prior, not a fitted result.

wc2022.note: Approximate retrospective. WC22 in Qatar (winter). Hybrid edges out both inputs on draws. DT ≈ Elo baseline (estimate).

euro2024.note: Approximate retrospective. Euro 2024 in Germany. Market edge largely from knockout upsets the model under-weighted. DT ≈ Elo baseline (estimate).
